headline: BofA Raises Target on Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) after Reviewing Market Conditions
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.72% as of May 29, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 29, BofA raised its price recommendation on Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) to $128 from $125. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm […]
